resources.string: Your cart is empty.
Some items in your cart are no longer available.
Failed to load your profile. Please try again.
Insufficient caps. You need %1$d caps but have %2$d.
Item not found in cart.
Cannot add more than %2$d of %1$s.
Failed to add item to cart. Please try again.
Failed to remove item from cart. Please try again.
Failed to update item quantity. Please try again.
Failed to clear cart. Please try again.
Failed to generate QR code. Please try again.
Failed to check item availability. Please try again.
Failed to fetch and add item. Please try again.
Failed to send message. Please try again.
Failed to load chat history. Please try again.
Chat connection lost. Reconnecting
Failed to upload image. Please try again.
Failed to load message. Please try again.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

Cannot use item: quantity is zero.
Failed to use item. Please try again.
Failed to load inventory. Please try again.
Failed to load selling items. Please try again.
Failed to add item to inventory. Please try again.
Failed to remove item from inventory. Please try again.
Failed to update item. Please try again.
Failed to sell item. Please try again.
An unexpected error occurred in inventory. Please try again.
Failed to load profile.
Failed to update preferences.
Failed to load selling items.
Failed to load transactions.
